name: Do It Yourself Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the bread (homemade) into 3/8-inch cubes and place in a bowl.
2. Add seasonings and oil to the bowl. Toss well to mix thoroughly.
3. Place the croutons on a cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 300°F until crisp.
5. Allow to cool before storing in a glass jar.
